---
title: "Fig 3: Dose Response Curves"
output: html_document
date: "2025-02-18"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Load Libraries
```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)   
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(sjPlot)
library(drc)
library(car)
library(writexl)
library(rempsyc)
library(data.table)
library(Rmisc) 
library(flextable)

# Avoid conflict functions with tidyverse
library(conflicted)
fxns <- c("mutate", "select", "arrange", "filter", "summarise", "rename")
for (f in fxns) {
  conflict_prefer(f, "dplyr", quiet = TRUE)
}
```

# Import Data 
```{r Allpam}
# Inshore Porites astreoides
IPa <- readxl::read_xlsx("data/PAM/2021-06-08_Past-4temps-Inshore.xlsx")

# Offshore Porites astreoides
OPa <- readxl::read_xlsx("data/PAM/2021-06-10_Past-4temps-Offshore.xlsx") %>%
  dplyr::select(-Temp)

# Combine all Datasets 
Allpam <- rbind(IPa, OPa) %>%
  mutate(Species = case_when(Species == "Porites astreoides" ~ "PAST")) %>%
  select(TubeNumber, sample_ID = SampleName, species = Species, Geno = Genotype, Treatment, Temperature = Temp_Setpoint, Timepoint, FvFm = PAM) %>%
  mutate(TP_ID = case_when(grepl("T1", sample_ID) ~ "T1",
                           grepl("T2", sample_ID) ~ "T2",
                           grepl("T3", sample_ID) ~ "T3",
                           grepl("T4", sample_ID) ~ "T4",
                           grepl("T5", sample_ID) ~ "T5",
                           grepl("T0", sample_ID) ~ "T0",
                           grepl("TF", sample_ID) ~ "TF")) %>%
  mutate(site = case_when(grepl("IPa", sample_ID) ~ "Inshore",
                          grepl("OPa", sample_ID) ~ "Offshore")) %>%
  mutate(Geno = case_when(Geno == "10.0" ~ "10", TRUE ~ Geno))

# Adjust item class in dataframe
Allpam$FacTemp<-as.factor(Allpam$Temperature)
Allpam$Geno<-as.factor(Allpam$Geno)
Allpam$Temperature<- as.integer(Allpam$Temperature)
Allpam<-as.data.frame(Allpam)
```

```{r create inshore and offshore Tpam dfs}
T3pam <- Allpam %>%
  filter(Timepoint == "T3")

Inpam <- T3pam %>%
  filter(site == "Inshore")

Offpam <- T3pam %>%
  filter(site == "Offshore")
```

# Run DRCs
```{r drcs}
# Both Sites Together
Alldrc <- drm(FvFm ~ Temperature, curveid = site, data = Allpam, fct = LL.3(names = c('hill', 'max', 'ed50')))

summary(Alldrc)
plot(Alldrc)

compParm(Alldrc, "ed50", "-")

# ___________________________________________________________________ #

# Inshore drc
Indrc <- drm(FvFm ~ Temperature, data = Inpam, fct = LL.3(names = c('hill', 'max', 'ed50')))

summary(Indrc)
plot(Indrc)

Indrc_geno <- drm(FvFm ~ Temperature, curveid = Geno, data = Inpam, fct = LL.3(names = c('hill', 'max', 'ed50')))

summary(Indrc_geno)
plot(Indrc_geno)

# Create ED50 df 
Indrc_ED_geno <- ED(Indrc_geno, c(50), interval = "delta", level = 0.95)
Indrc_ED_geno_df <- as.data.frame(Indrc_ED_geno) 

# Extract Values from model 
inED50_geno <- Indrc_ED_geno_df$Estimate
inse_geno <- Indrc_ED_geno_df$`Std. Error`

# ___________________________________________________________________ #

# Offshore drc 
Offdrc <- drm(FvFm ~ Temperature, data = Offpam, fct = LL.3(names = c('hill', 'max', 'ed50')))

summary(Offdrc)
plot(Offdrc)

Offdrc_geno <- drm(FvFm ~ Temperature, curveid = Geno, data = Offpam, fct = LL.3(names = c('hill', 'max', 'ed50')))

summary(Offdrc_geno)
plot(Offdrc_geno)

# Create ED50 df 
Offdrc_ED_geno <- ED(Offdrc_geno, c(50), interval = "delta", level = 0.95)
Offdrc_ED_geno_df <- as.data.frame(Offdrc_ED_geno) 

# Extract Values from model 
offED50_geno <- Offdrc_ED_geno_df$Estimate
offse_geno <- Offdrc_ED_geno_df$`Std. Error`
```

# Table S1 - Individual Model Fits
```{r Individual fits summary table}

In_Genos <- Indrc_ED_geno_df %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "Parameter") %>%
  mutate(
    Site = "Inshore",
    Genet = str_extract(Parameter, "(?<=:)\\d+(?=:)")  # extract number between colons
  ) %>%
  select(Site, Genet, ED50 = Estimate, SE = `Std. Error`, Upper, Lower) 

Off_Genos <- Offdrc_ED_geno_df %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "Parameter") %>%
  mutate(
    Site = "Offshore",
    Genet = str_extract(Parameter, "(?<=:)\\d+(?=:)")  # extract number between colons
  ) %>%
  select(Site, Genet, ED50 = Estimate, SE = `Std. Error`, Upper, Lower) 

Genos <- rbind(In_Genos, Off_Genos)

Genos_table <- nice_table(Genos)

save_as_docx(Genos_table, path = "Plots/Supplemental_Figs/Table_S1.docx")

```

# Compare ED50s and Calculate 95% CI
```{r t-test and CI calculation}
# Test Variances
var.test(offED50_geno, inED50_geno) # Equal variances 

# T-Test to compare Site ED50s 
invoff <- t.test(inED50_geno, offED50_geno, var.equal = TRUE)
invoff

# 95% Confidence Intervals
# Sample sizes
n_in <- length(inED50_geno)
n_off <- length(offED50_geno)

# Means and SDs
mean_in <- mean(inED50_geno)
mean_off <- mean(offED50_geno)
sd_in <- sd(inED50_geno)
sd_off <- sd(offED50_geno)

# Standard errors
se_in <- sd_in / sqrt(n_in)
se_off <- sd_off / sqrt(n_off)

# Critical t-value for 95% CI (two-tailed)
t_crit_in <- qt(0.975, df = n_in - 1)
t_crit_off <- qt(0.975, df = n_off - 1)

# Confidence intervals
CI_in <- c(mean_in - t_crit_in * se_in, mean_in + t_crit_in * se_in)
CI_off <- c(mean_off - t_crit_off * se_off, mean_off + t_crit_off * se_off)

CI_in
CI_off

ED50_param_table <- data.frame(
  site = c("Inshore", "Offshore"),
  ED50 = c(mean_in, mean_off),
  se = c(se_in, se_off),
  sd = c(sd_in, sd_off),
  CI_lower = c(CI_in[1], CI_off[1]),
  CI_upper = c(CI_in[2], CI_off[2])
)
```

```{r model predictions}
# Create prediction data frame across temperature range
Innewdata <- expand.grid(
  Temp = seq(min(28), max(41), length.out = 100),
  site = unique(Inpam$site)) 

Offnewdata <- expand.grid(
  Temp = seq(min(28), max(41), length.out = 100),
  site = unique(Offpam$site))

# Get predictions with standard errors
Inpreds <- as.data.frame(predict(Indrc, newdata = Innewdata, se.fit = TRUE))
Offpreds <- as.data.frame(predict(Offdrc, newdata = Offnewdata, se.fit = TRUE))

Innewdata$fit <- Inpreds$Prediction       # predicted value
Innewdata$se <- Inpreds$SE                # standard error

Offnewdata$fit <- Offpreds$Prediction     # predicted value
Offnewdata$se <- Offpreds$SE                # standard error

# Calculate 95% CI
Innewdata$lower <- Innewdata$fit - 1.96 * Innewdata$se
Innewdata$upper <- Innewdata$fit + 1.96 * Innewdata$se

Offnewdata$lower <- Offnewdata$fit - 1.96 * Offnewdata$se
Offnewdata$upper <- Offnewdata$fit + 1.96 * Offnewdata$se
```

# Figure 3
```{r plot Fig_3}
Fig_3 <- ggplot() +
  
  # Specify site colors
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Inshore" = "#8ADCE3", 
                                "Offshore" = "#003A9D"),
                     guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(
                         fill = c('#8ADCE3', '#003A9D'),color = NA, 
                         alpha = 1))) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Inshore" = "#8ADCE3", 
                             "Offshore" = "#003A9D")) +
  
  # Adjust x and y axis limits/breaks
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(29,41), breaks=c(30,32,34,36,38,40), 
                     expand = c(-0.005, 0)) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-0.5,0.65), expand = c(0,0.015)) +
  
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,0.62),clip="off") +
  
  # Add in predicted model curves 
  geom_line(data = Innewdata, aes(x = Temp, y = fit, color = site),
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  
  geom_line(data = Offnewdata, aes(x = Temp, y = fit, color = site), 
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  
  # Add confidence intervals around curve 
  geom_ribbon(data = Innewdata, aes(x = Temp, ymin = lower, ymax = upper,
                                    fill = site), alpha = 0.2) +
  
  geom_ribbon(data = Offnewdata, aes(x = Temp, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, 
                                  fill = site), alpha = 0.2) +

  # Add ED50 line
  geom_segment(data = ED50_param_table, 
             aes(x = ED50, xend = ED50, y = -Inf, yend = 0.62, color = site), 
             linewidth = 0.75) +
  
  # Add confidence interval shading around ED50 line 
  geom_rect(data = ED50_param_table, 
          aes(xmin = CI_lower, xmax = CI_upper, ymin = -Inf, ymax = 0.62, 
              fill = site), alpha = 0.15, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # Add ED50 labels
  annotate("text",x = 38.35, y = 0.61,
           label = paste0(round(mean_in, 2), "°C"), color = '#8ADCE3', 
           fontface = 'bold', size = 4) + 
    
  annotate("text",x = 36.35,y = 0.61,
           label = paste0(round(mean_off, 2), "°C"), color = '#003A9D', 
           fontface = 'bold', size = 4) +
 
   # Add data points for each fragment (n = 120)
  geom_point(data = T3pam, aes(x = Temperature, y = FvFm, 
                                           color = site), alpha = 0.75) +
  
  # Add significance distinctions
  geom_segment(aes(x = 36.94, xend = 37.77, y = 0.632, yend = 0.632),
               color = "black", size = 0.6) + # Horizontal Bracket 
  
  geom_segment(aes(x = 36.94, xend = 36.94, y = 0.633, yend = 0.622), 
               color = "black", size = 0.6) +  # Left vertical tick (upward)
  
  geom_segment(aes(x = 37.77, xend = 37.77, y = 0.633, yend = 0.623), 
               color = "black", size = 0.6) + # Right vertical tick (upward)
  
  annotate("text", x = (36.94 + 37.77) / 2, y = 0.6315, label = "**", 
           size = 6) +
  
# Theme 
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 20), 
        legend.position = c(0.1,0.08),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 13),
         plot.margin = margin(t = 0.25, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0, unit = "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  labs(x = expression("Temperature (" * degree * "C)"), y = bquote(F[v]/F[m]))

ggsave(
  filename = "Plots/Fig_3/Fig_3.pdf",  # Name of the output file
  plot = Fig_3,               # Specify the plot to save
  width = 7,                       # Width in inches
  height = 5                        # Height in inches
)

ggsave(
  filename = "Plots/Fig_3/Fig_3.png",  # Name of the output file
  plot = Fig_3,               # Specify the plot to save
  width = 7,                       # Width in inches
  height = 5                        # Height in inches
)
```
